title: Laden Iranian ships depart Chinese port tied to key military chemicals
summary_full: Experts said the vessels are probably carrying a key precursor for rocket fuel, making it notable that Beijing let them sail while the U.S. and Iran are at war.
summary_public: Experts said the vessels are probably carrying a key precursor for rocket fuel, making it notable that Beijing let them sail while the U.S. and Iran are at war.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: vessels are probably carrying a key precursor for rocket fuel
